course.title: HTML & CSS Fundamentals
course.description: Learn the building blocks of the web: HTML for structure and CSS for styling.

chapter.title: Basic Elements and Styling
chapter.description: Learn how to create paragraphs, links, and apply basic colors and styles.

lessons.title: Working with Text and Links
lessons.explanation:
HTML uses tags like `

` for paragraphs and `` for links. The `` tag requires an `href` attribute to specify the destination URL.

exercises.statement: Create a link that says 'Click Me' and points to 'https://google.com'.
exercises.hint: Use the <a> tag with the href attribute.

lessons.title: Introduction to CSS Colors
lessons.explanation: You can use inline CSS with the `style` attribute to change colors. Use `color` for text and `background-color` for backgrounds.
lessons.syntax:
Red text

Blue background

exercises.statement: Create a paragraph that says 'Warning' and has red text.
exercises.hint: Use the style attribute: style="color: red;"
